name: agent-hopper
description: Thin multi-LLM coordination protocol — dispatches task-typed work to vendor CLIs (codex, kimi, opencode, copilot, agy) without a harness reaction core. State lives in plain markdown under .hopper/.

plugins.name: hopper
plugins.description: Thin plugin layer over the llm-hopper file-based protocol. Dispatches task-typed work to vendor CLI subprocesses. No harness core; vendor CLIs bring their own runtime.
